items.title: Who am I? Guess World Cup star No 2
items.summary: Will you get today's player in as few attempts as possible?

items.title: World Oceans Day 2026: How diving is changing lives in Andaman’s Karen and Ranchi communities
items.summary: The ocean has always fed the Karen and Ranchi communities. Now, it is helping them build careers, concrete homes and futures in a way their ancestors never imagined
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Hayden set to coach Glasgow T20 franchise in ETPL
items.summary: Former Australia batter Matthew Hayden is set to be named head coach of Glasgow Cosmic for this summer's European T20 Premier League.
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
